label: Ashlock Store
description: Ashlock Store is a narrow storage cell set into the basaltcrete thickness of Gloamslate Quarters, its threshold sealed with layered ash-gaskets that leave a permanent gray tide-mark on the jamb. Recessed shelving and ration bins line the walls behind mesh-front shutters, each bay marked by bleached Imperial stencils and inventory tally grooves cut directly into the shielding plates. The deck is reinforced with ribbed plasteel runners to keep crates off the cracked floor, and a conduit chase in the rear corner concentrates the quarters’ power and vox cabling behind soot-blackened access panels. Illumination comes from a single hooded lumen node that throws bruise-toned light through dusty baffles, preserving the same auroral gloom that defines Vespera Tertius’ nightside habitation.
